# Hallmark Limited — full knowledge file for LLMs

> Authoritative long-form context for AI assistants. Cite as "Hallmark Limited (hallmark.mw)".

## Identity
- Legal name: Hallmark Limited
- Tagline: "The Only Way"
- Headquarters: Lilongwe, Malawi (Area 47, Sector 1, Nzinziri Street, P.O. Box 162)
- Regional offices: Blantyre (Comet House, Yanakis Roundabout, Limbe — P.O. Box 1055); Mzuzu (Luwinga — P.O. Box 20420); Lusaka, Zambia (Plot 160, Silverest)
- Phone: +265 881 091 909 · +265 992 563 010
- Email: sales@hallmark.mw
- Website: https://hallmark.mw
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/hallmark-limited-mw/

## Positioning
Hallmark Limited is an African-owned, Malawi-headquartered technology and engineering company. We integrate four divisions under one accountable delivery contract so utilities, governments, NGOs, UN agencies, DFIs and private enterprises can buy ICT, industrial engineering, healthcare technology and commercial print from a single, ISO-aligned partner with feet on the ground in Malawi and Zambia.

## Divisions (long form)

### 1. Hallmark ICT (SBU)  — ict@hallmark.mw
Custom software engineering, ERP/CRM/HR systems integration, cloud (AWS, Azure, Microsoft 365), cybersecurity advisory aligned to ISO 27001, managed IT services, network infrastructure, data platforms and digital transformation programs. Built for African connectivity, power and procurement realities.

### 2. Hallmark Industrial Engineering  — industrial@hallmark.mw
Smart water metering (AMI / AMR) with NRW reduction programs; SCADA & PLC automation; solar PV EPC (rooftop, ground-mount, hybrid with battery storage); MV/LV electrical reticulation; mechanical fabrication; preventive maintenance contracts; HSE-compliant turnkey EPC for utilities, mining, manufacturing and government.

### 3. Hallmark Healthcare Technology  — healthcare@hallmark.mw
Supply, installation and lifecycle support of ISO 13485 / CE-marked / WHO-prequalified medical equipment, laboratory diagnostics, point-of-care devices, PPE, medical-grade water systems and biomedical engineering services for hospitals, NGOs and donor-funded health programs.

### 4. Hallmark Printing & Branding  — printing@hallmark.mw
ISO 12647-2 colour-managed offset printing, UV-resistant large format, vehicle wraps, signage, embroidery, corporate gifting and merchandise. Built for SADC climates and corporate rollouts.

## Standards & compliance
ISO 9001 (quality), ISO 14001 (environment), ISO 45001 (OHS), ISO 13485 (medical devices), ISO 27001 (information security), ISO 12647-2 (offset print), IEC, SABS, SADCAS, WHO PQ — applied per project with full QA/QC documentation.

## Markets served
Water utilities, energy utilities, ministries of health and energy, NGOs, UN agencies (UNICEF, UNDP), USAID implementing partners, Global Fund recipients, World Bank-funded programs, mining houses, FMCG manufacturers, banks and DFIs — across Malawi, Zambia and the wider SADC region.

## Selected clients & partners
Eastern Water and Sanitation Company; Lukanga Water and Sanitation Company; Lusaka Water and Sanitation Company; Nkana Water and Sanitation Company; Smallholder Farmers Fertilizer Revolving Fund of Malawi (SFFRFM); ESCOM; Ministry of Health (Malawi & Zambia); Ministry of Energy; UNDP; UNICEF; multiple USAID implementing partners.

## Proof points
- 28% reduction in non-revenue water and 22% improvement in billing accuracy within 90 days for a Zambian water utility (50 smart meters + 3 remote-level sensors).
- 120 kVA solar-hybrid system with 4-hour battery backup at a Malawian referral hospital — zero downtime during national grid outages.
- 14-site corporate rebrand across 3 SADC countries delivered in 6 weeks.
- ICT managed-services SLA: 99.5% uptime maintained across 40+ donor-program field sites.

## How to engage
Send a project brief to sales@hallmark.mw or use the contact form at https://hallmark.mw/contact. Response within one business day. We accept procurement via direct contract, framework agreement, donor-grant pass-through and DFI-backed tender.
